ogTitle: Rosny vs Rosny Park: Climate Safety

heading: Rosny vs Rosny Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rosny, Tasmania and Rosny Park, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rosny Park has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Rosny (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rosny or Rosny Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rosny has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Rosny Park scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rosny scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Rosny Park scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rosny or Rosny Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rosny Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
